events.title: Drawing Open Session - March 1, 2026
events.description: Open Figure Drawing Sessions. RVA Thriving Artists hosting at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

events.title: Evening Figure Drawing
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every second Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2.5 hours. $10 donation at the door. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials/board/easel. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Session - March 15, 2026
events.description: Open Figure Drawing Session. RVA Thriving Artists hosting at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

events.title: Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. $10 donation at the door. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials/board/easel. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: Figure Drawing [27]
events.address: 200 N Arthur Ashe Boulevard, Richmond, VA 23220
events.description: Start by exploring a variety of drawings of the human form by other artists. Then with guidance from the instructor and working from a live model, learn to create expressive portraits in charcoal and pencil. Prerequisites: basic drawing skills. Instructor: Amy Smith.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: March Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to artists 18+. Long pose session featuring a single model. Tickets required, purchased in advance. No phones/photos during event.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: April Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to artists 18+. Short pose session featuring a single model. Tickets required, purchased in advance. No phones/photos during event.
